title: Amtech S5162 Picture Hanging Kit, Picture Hangers, Picture Hooks, Wall Pegs, Hanging Wire, 180pc
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: VERSATILE: This 180 piece picture hanging kit contains a handy selection of brackets, screws, wire, nails and clips which can be used on a wide range of surfaces, including drywall and wood
STORAGE BOX: The kit is supplied in a handy organiser with a visual description for easy selection
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech has a fantastic range of essential DIY hardware and tools for all your household needs. The Amtech S5162 Picture Hanging Kit has an assorted selection of different size hooks and hangers for your much-loved family photos, art prints and paintings. Supplied in a handy storage box with a visual itemised guide and you can also use the kit for seasonal decorations. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
